title: aira caryophyllea var. inflexa
intro: Aira caryophyllea var. inflexa, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Aira caryophyllea var. inflexa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Aira caryophyllea var. inflexa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
